Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class BriefcaseRule

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.BriefcaseRule
public class BriefcaseRule extends SObject

Java class for BriefcaseRule complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BriefcaseRule">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Briefcase" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}BriefcaseDefinition" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BriefcaseId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BriefcaseRuleFilters" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FilterLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAscendingOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderBy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRule" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}BriefcaseRule" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRuleId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueryScope" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordLimit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedBriefcaseRules" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelationshipField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelationshipType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
